projects.name: Faruk Resume Site
projects.description: Personal resume site built with Vue 3, Vuetify, and Express. PDF export, Gmail API resume delivery, and semantic versioning.

projects.name: Financeiro
projects.description: Personal finance web app to import Nubank CSV statements, auto-categorize transactions with custom rules, review entries, and track monthly budgets. Built with Fastify, Vue 3, and PostgreSQL.

projects.name: Job Hunter
projects.description: Searches MyGreenhouse for remote full-time jobs and filters geo-restricted listings so Brazil-based candidates see only eligible roles. Vue 3 frontend, Fastify/Node.js backend, TypeScript throughout.
